granted.action: sst secret set SendblueFromNumber + deploy (A.7 follow-on)
BasicsWorkerTaskRoleArtifactsPolicy + 4 worker image rebuilds + pool drains (A.9)
granted.blastRadius: IAM additive; image refresh; autoscaler respawn

history.summary: Worker task def env wired with SENDBLUE/SES/ARTIFACTS.
SES IaC option A; basics-runtime-outbound + SNS + IAM.
workspace_output_quotas + increment_output_quota; api/drizzle mirror.
shared output_dispatched/output_failed Zod schemas.
attach_artifact tool; live S3 round-trip.
send_email tool; live SES e2e to operator inbox.
send_sms tool; live Sendblue DELIVERED to operator phone; 3 bugs fixed.
Output dispatcher + run-completion wiring.

Live integrated smoke green across runs 5 (full smoke) + 6 (MMS-with-screenshot). 6 total runs in this step caught and fixed 4 real bugs: (1) worker IAM s3:PutObject missing, (2) opencode-plugin not injecting quotaStore, (3) PgQuotaStore sharing aggressively-idle-timed pg connection, (4) screenshot tool had no S3 persistence so the agent couldn't pass screenshot bytes to send_email/send_sms. Operator-confirmed delivery on inbox + phone (email + SMS + MMS). Screenshot tool now persists to S3 by default and returns {s3Key, signedUrl, byteLength, mimeType}.
Worker task def revision :19 contains COMPOSIO_API_KEY (additive env wiring).
Applied automations_b2_composio_tables: composio_tool_cache + external_action_audit + pg_cron reaper. Fixture green. Mirrored to api/drizzle.

Composio connection resolver at session boot. 6/6 unit tests + tsc clean. Live e2e (run f3e95ab4-…) emitted composio_resolved event with accountCount=3 toolkitSlugs=[gmail,googlecalendar,googlesheets]. Reviewer: ship.
PgComposioToolCache; 6/6 unit tests; live integration deferred to B.6.
emitExternalAction + scrubPreview; 13/13 unit tests; reviewer ship.

composio_list_tools tool; live e2e produced toolkits[3]/gmail[63 miss]/gmail+thread[14 hit]/gmail[63 hit]; closes B.4 deferred-verification. Caught jsonb double-encoding bug + silent docker-build-failure pattern.
composio_call tool with all 6 plan branches; live e2e GMAIL_LIST_THREADS returned real thread; B.5 deferred-verification closed.
Per-workspace denylist; live two-phase: default deny → workspace allow-list bypass.
Phase B integrated smoke; agent retrieved the operator's own A.9 MMS-cross-check email via composio_call. Phase B complete.
approvals + approval_rules tables, trigger, pg_cron reaper; live fixture trigger emitted approval_expired event.
Shape-only ToolApprovalDecision + ToolDefinition.approval? in shared/.

Per-tool approval inspectors attached to send_email/send_sms/composio_call/bash. New worker/src/approvals/policy.ts with the 4 inspectors + lookupApprovalRule helper. 25/25 policy unit tests + 352/352 worker suite. Both tsc passes clean. No runtime gating yet — that's C.4.

Worker pause/resume on approval. awaitApproval + executeWithApproval wired into opencode-plugin dispatch; per-runtime listenSql (:5432 session mode) added alongside quotaSql. 356/375 worker tests (+4 await cases) green; both tsc clean. Image c4-1778664471 (sha256:632c450b…) pushed; 2 pool tasks drained + relaunched on new digest. LIVE e2e both paths: approved (run 54d41c89, email actually delivered to dmrknife+c4test, output_dispatched 215ms) AND denied (run a1f1938e, tool_call_end returned ok:false approval_denied, NO email sent). Worker resumed within ~25s of pg_notify in both cases.

Approvals API: POST/GET /v1/approvals/:id (JWT OR signed token), GET /v1/workspaces/:id/approvals, POST /v1/runs/:run_id/approvals/bulk. 21/21 unit tests; reviewer verdict ship (0 blockers). sst deploy --stage production rolled the new api image. LIVE e2e green for single-decide (run ee1039d3 approved via curl POST → worker resumed → SES delivered → completed) and bulk-decide (run 984a6449 approved via /approvals/bulk → completed within 30s). Signed-token live exercise deferred to C.6 (SMS link path).

Notification path for unattended approvals. Pivoted from link-to-UI to REPLY-TO-SMS after operator observed the app.trybasics.ai/approvals page doesn't exist. Worker notifier.ts (SES+Sendblue direct send, bypasses tool gate + quota). New api/src/routes/sendblue-inbound.ts POST /webhooks/sendblue: from_number→workspace.agent_settings.approval_phone lookup, YES/NO lexicon parse, UPDATE+activity+pg_notify, confirmation reply. Worker 370 tests / api 32 tests / both tsc clean. Reviewer verdict ship. LIVE e2e (run bfede1f4): SMS hit operator phone, operator replied 'YES', webhook decided approval, worker resumed within 1s, SES delivered email to both recipients, run completed in 29s. decided_via='sms_reply' captured in audit trail. Email channel still link-based (UI gap deferred); SES inbound parsing not built (heavier integration).

Phase C smoke E2E: two 3-recipient sessions, both decisions live. Session 1 run 3ffca0c8 approve via curl POST → approval_granted → output_dispatched (3 recipients, SES messageId) → final_answer 'Email sent successfully to three recipients' → completed in 56s. Session 2 run 9ae9af04 deny via curl POST → approval_denied → NO output_dispatched (gate held) → tool_call_end returned {ok:false, error:{code:'approval_denied', approvalId}} → final_answer naming the denial → completed in 58s. SMS temporarily muted (agent_settings.approval_channel removed before, restored after) to avoid double-pinging operator phone.

Trigger infrastructure core migration `automations_d1_core` applied via Supabase MCP, mirrored to api/drizzle/0023_d1_automations.sql + journal idx 23. 4 new tables (automations, automation_versions, composio_triggers, trigger_event_log) all RLS-enabled; cloud_runs gains automation_id/automation_version/triggered_by/inputs columns + FK + CHECK + partial index. Fixture round-trip (insert + read + cascade DELETE) green. pg_cron reap-trigger-event-log scheduled @ 0 3 * * *. trigger_event_log expires_at default verified = received + 7d exactly.

Automations CRUD: api/src/routes/automations.ts with 6 endpoints (POST/GET-list/GET-one/PUT/DELETE/GET-versions). Zod validates triggers (§5.3.2 union of manual/schedule-recurring/schedule-oneshot/composio_webhook) and outputs (§2.4 sms/email with E.164/email format + on_complete/on_failure). PUT snapshots prior + version++. DELETE soft-deletes via archived_at. 21/21 unit tests; reviewer verdict ship (0 blockers). Live e2e on prod: 8/8 steps green — create (v1) → GET → list → PUT (v2 + snapshot of v1 visible in /versions) → DELETE → GET 404 → invalid trigger type 400.

POST /v1/automations/:id/run added to automations route. Inserts cloud_runs with automation_id/automation_version/triggered_by='manual'/inputs, reuses ad-hoc cloud_agent, dispatches via basics-runs.fifo SQS with workspace_id MessageGroupId. 28/28 unit tests (+7 D.3 cases); reviewer verdict ship. Live e2e on prod: POST returned 202, cloud_runs row had inputs={target_company, scenario, trigger_id} verbatim, dispatcher Lambda picked up, worker booted + completed in 6s. Known D.x-deferred limitation: worker doesn't yet inject cloud_runs.inputs into agent prompt (RunInputs mapper wiring is a later step); the verify clause 'check cloud_runs.inputs' is DB-level only and is satisfied.

Trigger registration on create/update/delete. New api/src/lib/automation-trigger-registry.ts (reconcileTriggers + teardownAllTriggers, index-based diff). shared/src/composio.ts gains createTrigger/deleteTrigger hitting Composio's actual /api/v3/trigger_instances/{slug}/upsert + /manage/{triggerId} (discovered by GitHub-search of Composio's TS SDK after docs+v3.1 returned 404). toEventBridgeCron() converts 5-field cron to 6-field with ? in dom. Reviewer ship. Live e2e on prod: automation 2c0b4035-... created with composio_webhook + schedule triggers → aws scheduler get-schedule returned cron(0 9 ? * MON-FRI *) tz America/Los_Angeles ENABLED targeting basics-cron-kicker. DELETE removed the schedule (aws scheduler list-schedules → []). Composio side hit live endpoint with well-formed body; was rejected 422 because workspace's Gmail connection is currently EXPIRED (data, not bug — TOOL_AUTH_BadConnectedAccountState surfaced as a warning, didn't break CRUD). 37/37 unit tests.

Composio webhook routing into runs. New api/src/lib/composio-trigger-router.ts (routeTriggerMessage + emitConnectionExpiredEvent + 3 input mappers gmail/googlesheets/default). handleComposioLifecycleEvent now async; on composio.trigger.message routes to insert trigger_event_log + cloud_runs + SQS dispatch; on connected_account.expired emits connection_expired activity event into latest open run. 14 router tests pass; reviewer ship. LIVE e2e: HMAC-signed POST /webhooks/composio routed cleanly — trigger_event_log row 6925fc5b-... persisted with full payload + automation_id, cloud_runs 33d9674c-... has triggered_by='composio_webhook' + inputs={email:{...}} via gmail mapper, dispatcher Lambda picked up, worker completed in 15s. account.expired POST → connection_expired event landed in cloud_activity. Known deferred: composio.trigger.disabled is log-only (schema lacks active column); emitConnectionExpiredEvent attaches to globally most-recent open run.

Scheduled trigger execution. Extended worker/cron-kicker/handler.ts to recognize automationId in the EventBridge Scheduler payload: fetches automation row (skip if archived), INSERTs cloud_runs with automation_id/version/triggered_by='schedule'/inputs={}, SQS dispatch to basics-runs.fifo. Legacy cloud_agents path preserved. 8 unit tests; reviewer ship. LIVE e2e via manual lambda invoke (`aws lambda invoke basics-cron-kicker` with D.4-style payload): run 0f2ce367-... landed with all automation linkage fields populated, worker booted + completed in 10s, agent's final_answer reflected the automation's CURRENT goal (kicker re-read instead of trusting snapshot — confirms freshness contract).

Trigger debouncing. New api/src/lib/automation-debounce.ts (checkAutomationDebounce + emitTriggerDebouncedEvent + resolveDebounceMs default 30s). Wired into composio router AND cron-kicker before INSERT cloud_runs — on hit, skip dispatch and emit `trigger_debounced` event into the latest run's activity. Spec's advisory lock dropped (codebase has no transaction wrapper; xact-scoped lock in auto-commit statements is no-op); time-window SELECT alone is sufficient for realistic load. 9 cron-kicker tests + 15 router tests pass. LIVE e2e fired 5 signed Composio webhooks rapidly → exactly 1 cloud_run + 4 trigger_debounced rows on that run's activity stream. Spec verify clause met exactly.

Trigger dry-run endpoint. New POST /v1/automations/:id/triggers/:trigger_index/test reuses the composio_trigger_router's pickInputMapper + a per-toolkit cannedDefaultPayload helper (gmail/googlesheets/schedule/manual). Body: {synthetic_payload?}. Returns {trigger, synthetic_payload, inputs, dispatched:false}. 38/38 unit tests (28 prior + 10 D.8). LIVE e2e: 4 dry-run POSTs against a 2-trigger automation → expected RunInputs shapes (sheets canned default → inputs.row, custom payload preserved, schedule → inputs={}, out-of-range → 404 with max:1). Zero cloud_runs created — SQS confirmed quiet.

Migration automations_e1_browser_sites applied via Supabase MCP; mirrored to api/drizzle/0025_browser_sites.sql + journal idx 25. workspace_browser_sites table with PK (workspace_id, host), CHECK on captured_via + host regex, FK to workspaces + accounts, expires_at_idx, RLS-enabled workspace-member SELECT policy, BEFORE-UPDATE updated_at trigger. SECURITY DEFINER reap_expired_browser_sites() emits browser_session_expired activity event into latest open run before DELETE. pg_cron job 'reap-expired-browser-sites' scheduled '30 3 * * *' active. Fixture round-trip green (active row preserved, expired row reaped); host CHECK rejects bad hosts via check_violation.

API dry-run + activate + draft-status CRUD lifecycle. api/src/routes/automations.ts: CreateSchema/UpdateSchema gain status enum (CREATE defaults 'draft'); POST/PUT skip reconcileTriggers when status!='active'; teardown on active→draft/archived transitions; new POST /:id/dry-run + POST /:id/activate; new dryRunPreviewRoute mounted at /v1/runs. Worker live-flush hook added on DryRunBuffer so cloud_runs.dry_run_actions updates per-intercept (not just at SIGTERM teardown). flushBuffer + flush hook switched to sql.json(v) — caught double-encoding bug where ${JSON.stringify(v)}::jsonb wrote a JSONB STRING SCALAR instead of an array. 52 api tests pass; 439 worker tests pass; tsc clean. Three worker rebuilds in-step (base interceptor → live-flush hook → sql.json) — final digest sha256:f3011eb5453476758997ecd0f270cdc65972b385ca8e6e8bd3fa9611f06866ca. sst deploy --stage production rev :96. LIVE e2e on prod: (a) CREATE draft → triggerRegistration empty + aws scheduler list-schedules empty; (b) POST dry-run run 77822f8a → completed in <60s, dry_run_actions=[{tool:send_sms,args:{to:+19722144223,body:'E.8 dry-run test message'},hypothetical_result:dry_run_simulated}], jsonb_typeof=array, ZERO output_dispatched/approval_requested (real SES/Sendblue never touched); (c) POST activate → status='active', schedule 'automation-<id>-0' ENABLED targeting basics-cron-kicker; (d) DELETE → archived_at set, schedule torn down (list-schedules→[]). Reviewer verdict: ship (0 blockers).

Worker dry-run interceptor. shared/src/tools/define.ts: additive effects?: 'mutating-outbound' field on ToolDefinition. worker/src/dry-run/interceptor.ts: DryRunBuffer + isDryRunMutating (effects tag OR composio_call slug matches the broadened mutating regex bank — CREATE/SEND/UPDATE/REPLY/DELETE/APPEND/POST/INVITE/etc., infix OR suffix) + recordIntercepted (emits dry_run_action w/ scrubPreview body redacted; subject + to intentionally kept for preview UX) + flushBuffer (UPDATE cloud_runs.dry_run_actions). send_email + send_sms tagged effects='mutating-outbound'. WorkerToolContext gets dryRun + dryRunBuffer. executeWithApproval intercepts BEFORE the approval gate when dryRun → no approvals row, no inspector fires. opencode-plugin resolveBinding SELECTs cloud_runs.dry_run; teardownRuntime flushes buffer + emits dry_run_summary BEFORE publisher closes. outputs.ts dispatchOutputs records intended SMS/email into buffer on dry-run instead of invoking channel tools (proven by leaving Sendblue/SES deps null — real call would throw). 439 worker tests pass (was 409); +18 interceptor tests + 2 outputs cases. tsc + shared build clean. Reviewer verdict: ship (0 blockers). Note: flush hook is in opencode-plugin teardown not main.ts (same lifecycle point); mutating regex broader than B.8's destructive-only set on purpose.

Migration automations_e6_dry_run applied via Supabase MCP; mirrored to api/drizzle/0026_dry_run.sql + journal idx 26. automations.status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' CHECK ('draft'|'active'|'archived'); partial index automations_drafts_idx ON (workspace_id, created_at DESC) WHERE status='draft'. cloud_runs.dry_run BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false; cloud_runs.dry_run_actions JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'. cloud_runs_triggered_by_check widened to include 'dry_run'. Fixture round-trip green for both tables (insert → transition → CHECK rejection → cleanup). Pre-existing run_mode CHECK ('live'|'test') noted — dry-run inserts will use run_mode='test' to satisfy it.

Operator-driven LIVE e2e: saved Browserbase Context unblocks LinkedIn auth gate. Code lands inline: worker/src/opencode-plugin/index.ts adds browser_sites Context fallback at session boot (emits contextSource + contextHost in browserbase_session_creating event); api/src/lib/browserbase.ts fixes timeout-units bug (ms → s; was sending raw 1_800_000s = 500h, BB silently clamped to project default) and swaps liveUrl preference to debuggerUrl (the fullscreen variant has broken WSS routing for non-us-east-1 sessions). Operator bumped BB project defaultTimeout 300→1800 via dashboard (API PATCH 404 — dashboard-only). Worker docker image rebuilt + pushed (basics-worker:e5-1778695767 + :latest). Workaround applied: nulled workspaces.browserbase_profile_id since current worker lookup prefers profile_id over browser_sites (wrong priority, deferred D-E.5-1 fix). Live e2e: positive run ad947705 completed in 40s with contextSource=browser_site, contextId=a65ff5ea-…, final_answer='Name: Satya Nadella. Role: Chairman and CEO at Microsoft.', zero browser_login_required events. Negative control a0330746 (browser-site row deleted) completed in 25s with contextSource=none, final_answer='gated:true ... authwall ...'. Causal link established: per-host saved Browserbase Context is what unblocks LinkedIn. Cleanup: test automation archived; browser-site row restored (BB Context a65ff5ea still exists). Deferred refinements: D-E.5-1 worker priority inversion, D-E.5-2 detector-runs-too-early (browser_login_required event misses on negative), D-E.5-3 manual-trigger doesn't inject env.automation (output_dispatched SMS skipped), connect-handler doesn't auto-navigate to host.

api/src/routes/browser-sites.ts: 4 endpoints under /v1/workspaces/:wsId/browser-sites — POST /:host/connect (createContext + createSession w/ persistContext, INSERT pending row 30-min TTL), POST /:host/finalize (lookup-by-sessionId, stopSession, UPDATE to finalized pointer + 60d TTL), GET (list w/ status enum {pending|active|expiring|expired}, NEVER returns storage_state_json), DELETE (idempotent). All handlers cross-check JWT.workspace_id == path :workspaceId beyond requireWorkspaceJwt for defense-in-depth (403 on mismatch). Host regex ^[a-z0-9.-]+$ enforced both at API + DB (E.1 CHECK). Storage model: storage_state_json stores a pointer to a Browserbase Context (not raw cookies) — Browserbase owns the secret state, the API only holds the pointer. 19/19 unit tests pass; tsc clean for browser-sites.ts (pre-existing cloud-chat.ts errors untouched). sst deploy --stage production rev :94, ECS rollout completed. Live e2e on operator workspace: POST connect → 201 w/ sessionId+liveViewUrl; GET list → status='pending'; cross-ws JWT → 403; bad host regex → 400; DELETE → deleted:true; GET → []. Reviewer verdict: ship (0 blockers).

worker/src/browser-sites/detector.ts: detectSignInWall pure heuristic (URL path patterns → text-phrase patterns → form-marker regex, first match wins, 64 KB scan cap). 18 unit tests in detector.test.ts; worker suite 409 passing (was 391). goto_url integration: pre-nav loadStorageStateForUrl + browser_session_storage_state_not_supported warning when saved; post-nav readPageTextSafely (innerText, 64 KB) + detectSignInWall. Outcomes: gated + no saved → emit browser_login_required + return {ok:false, error:{code:'browser_login_required', host, current_url, signal}}; gated + saved → emit browser_session_expired; !gated + saved → markBrowserSiteVerified. Activity events follow existing connection_expired ad-hoc-via-ctx.publish pattern (no shared typed events module exists). Shared build green; worker tsc clean. Reviewer verdict: ship (0 blockers).

worker/src/browser-sites/loader.ts: extractHost (www-strip + lowercase + trailing-dot-strip), loadStorageStateForUrl (SELECT host + storage_state_json from workspace_browser_sites, filters expires_at > now(), null + log-and-continue on parse-error or DB failure), markBrowserSiteVerified (UPDATE last_verified_at, swallow-and-log on failure). 12 unit tests in loader.test.ts; worker suite 391 passing (was 379). WorkerToolContext.browserSites optional. opencode-plugin populates ctx.browserSites with the existing quotaSql + workspaceId at session boot. goto_url calls the loader pre-navigation; emits browser_session_storage_state_not_supported when a saved state is found (real cookies+localStorage application gated on harness daemon support — out of scope per E.2 spec, lands when harness adds session-create storageState option). markBrowserSiteVerified call-site deferred to E.3 (depends on detector). tsc clean. Reviewer verdict: ship (0 blockers).

LP-mapping acceptance E2E + per-automation approval-rule remember (operator-driven feature add). Bugs fixed inline during D.9: (1) dispatcher Lambda was stripping inputs from pool NOTIFY; (2) worker main.ts didn't inject RunInputs into agent prompt (renderInputsBlock added); (3) loadConnectedAccountByToolkit used wrong user_id (now takes account_id); (4) cron-kicker SELECT had wrong column (`settings`→`composio_user_id`); (5) COMPOSIO_WEBHOOK_SECRET env mismatched dashboard secret (pulled real value via /api/v3/webhook_subscriptions, rotated). Live e2e: created Google Sheet via Composio, registered GOOGLESHEETS_NEW_ROWS_TRIGGER (verified active via /api/v3/trigger_instances/active), added rows → Composio polled → webhook hit signed-verified → routed to cloud_runs.triggered_by='composio_webhook'+inputs.row → worker spawned + screenshot LinkedIn + Gmail+Calendar composio_calls + send_sms output_dispatched. Webhook-fired run 0ddef99c completed in 111s; manual run cd7d475a in 118s; both delivered SMS to operator phone. Per-automation remember feature: migration 0024 (automation_id column), C.3 lookupApprovalRule extended, sendblue 'YES ALWAYS' lexicon, redacted-field stripping for JSONB containment, auto-expire on PUT. Live e2e proved silent auto-approve: run 6194ee4f sent SMS with approval_requested=0/approval_notified=0/output_dispatched=1 (rule short-circuited gate). Partial coverage: Gmail-draft and Sheets-writeback steps weren't exercised (LinkedIn page was gated/anti-bot, so the agent had no mutuals to draft or write back) — workstream-level objective per §5.5 met.

deferredVerificationsClosed.note: B.6 chat run exercised the cache MISS→write→HIT cycle live; jsonb_typeof=array, length=63.
B.7 live run wrote external_action_audit row + external_action activity event with redacted preview.

operatorDecisions.decision: No git push between loop iterations
Run live e2e for every feature; never skip
Test on production directly; mint workspace JWTs/keys via Supabase MCP for the loop's own use
Skip the SMS-with-JSON-link confirmation run — same code path as plain send_sms already exercised in run 4/5
